item.title: [Segurança] Fortinet Patches Actively Exploited CVE-2026-35616 in FortiClient EMS
item.description:
🚨 Fortinet Patches Actively Exploited CVE-2026-35616 in FortiClient EMS
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: The Hacker News
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A publicação relata a vulnerabilidade CVE-2026-35616 associada a Qualys. Vale consultar o link para verificar impacto, versões afetadas e orientações de correção.
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/04/fortinet-patches-actively-exploited-cve.html

item.title: [Segurança] Hackers exploit React2Shell in automated credential theft campaign
item.description:
🚨 Hackers exploit React2Shell in automated credential theft campaign
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Hackers are running a large-scale campaign to steal credentials in an automated way after exploiting React2Shell (CVE-2025-55182) in vulnerable Next.js apps.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/hackers-exploit-react2shell-in-automated-credential-theft-campaign/

item.title: [Segurança] CVE-2026-23435 - Check Point
item.description:
🚨 CVE-2026-23435 - Check Point
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: Check Point
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
In the Linux kernel, the following vulnerability has been resolved: perf/x86: Move event pointer setup earlier in x86_pmu_enable() A production AMD EPYC system crashed with a NULL pointer dereference in the PMU NMI handler: BUG: kernel NULL pointer dereference, address: 0000000000000198 RIP: x86_perf_event_update+0xc/0xa0 Call Trace: amd_pmu_v2_handle_irq+0x1a6/0x390 perf_event_nmi_handler+0x24/0x40 The faulting inst...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-23435

item.title: [Sistemas / Cloud] CVE-2026-3571 - WordPress
item.description:
🚨 CVE-2026-3571 - WordPress
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: WordPress
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 6.5
Resumo:
The Pie Register – User Registration, Profiles & Content Restriction plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to unauthorized modification of data due to a missing capability check on the pie_main() function in all versions up to, and including, 3.8.4.8. This makes it possible for unauthenticated attackers to change registration form status.
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-3571

item.title: [Sistemas / Cloud] CVE-2025-64340 - Windows Server
item.description:
🚨 CVE-2025-64340 - Windows Server
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: Windows Server
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 6.7
Resumo:
FastMCP is the standard framework for building MCP applications. Prior to version 3.2.0, server names containing shell metacharacters (e.g., &) can cause command injection on Windows when passed to fastmcp install claude-code or fastmcp install gemini-cli. These install paths use subprocess.run() with a list argument, but on Windows the target CLIs often resolve to .cmd wrappers that are executed through cmd.exe, whi...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2025-64340

item.title: [Segurança] 36 Malicious npm Packages Exploited Redis, PostgreSQL to Deploy Persistent Implants
item.description:
💣 36 Malicious npm Packages Exploited Redis, PostgreSQL to Deploy Persistent Implants
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: The Hacker News
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Cybersecurity researchers have discovered 36 malicious packages in the npm registry that are disguised as Strapi CMS plugins but come with different payloads to facilitate Redis and PostgreSQL exploitation, deploy reverse shells, harvest credentials, and drop a persistent implant. "Every package contains three files (package.json, index.js, postinstall.js), has no description, repository,
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/04/36-malicious-npm-packages-exploited.html

item.title: [Segurança] Hims & Hers warns of data breach after Zendesk support ticket breach
item.description:
📰 Hims & Hers warns of data breach after Zendesk support ticket breach
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Telehealth giant Hims & Hers Health is warning that it suffered a data breach after support tickets were stolen from a third-party customer service platform.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/hims-and-hers-warns-of-data-breach-after-zendesk-support-ticket-breach/

item.description:
